narrative:
Precinct Tiffin 2-A (precinct in Seneca County) has 936 registered voters, with 66.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
